testcase.name: test_declare_parcel
testcase.failure: tests/test_greenlink_api.py:187: in test_declare_parcel assert response.status_code == 200, f"Parcel declaration failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Parcel declaration failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","farmer_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"location":"Bouaflé Test","region":"Marahoué","area_hectares":2.5,"trees_count":350,"crop_type":"cacao","farming_practices":["agroforesterie","compost"]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","phone_number"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"location":"Bouaflé Test","region":"Marahoué","area_hectares":2.5,"trees_count":350,"crop_type":"cacao","farming_practices":["agroforesterie","compost"]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_buyer_order
testcase.failure: tests/test_greenlink_api.py:243: in test_create_buyer_order assert response.status_code == 200, f"Order creation failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Order creation failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","delivery_date"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"crop_type":"cacao","quantity_needed_kg":5000,"delivery_location":"Abidjan Port","max_price_per_kg":1500,"carbon_requirement":true,"min_carbon_score":7.0,"delivery_deadline":"2026-03-15"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
